steps.title: Join two complete clauses
steps.content: The sentence has two complete clauses: the game was derived from cricket, and kilikiti differs from cricket in several ways. A comma plus the coordinating conjunction "but" correctly joins those contrasting clauses.

steps.title: Reject faulty punctuation
steps.content: Choice A places a colon after "but," which cannot introduce the second clause. Choice B uses a comma after "but" incorrectly. Choice D adds an unnecessary comma after "but," interrupting the subject and verb.

steps.title: Use comma plus but
steps.content: A comma before "but" correctly links the two independent clauses. The answer is C.
